expected_reason_codes.non_runtime_notice: These codes are comparison-harness diagnostics only and must not be loaded by runtime selector code.

source_grounding.source_corpus: synthetic RelayOps incident-card corpus supplied in blind authoring package
source_grounding.grounding_note: Only the supplied card IDs and their schema-derived signatures ground this evaluation asset.

acceptance_reason: The candidate pool contains source cards from distinct incident families and must fail closed at candidate-pool validation before any representative comparison may occur.
diagnostic_explanation: This is deliberately a mixed-family candidate pool. It rejects cross-family membership before selector execution and does not ask the selector to choose a representative.
